structured.title: USB-C hardware chat
structured.overview: The team discussed the pendant redesign. USB-C PD negotiation is handled by a CC resistor that signals device role. The current wireless charging coil costs 3.20 dollars per unit. Waterproofing means the port needs an IP67 rated rubber gasket.

transcript_segments.text: Remember, the nRF52840 chip we use was released by Nordic Semiconductor.
And our battery is 250mAh which means roughly two days of runtime.
